summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/988 on General Product Safety (GPSR) replaced Directive 2001/95/EC (GPSD) from 13 December 2024. All consumer products placed on the EU market — including furniture — must be safe. The GPSR requires economic operators to: (1) ensure products are safe before placing on the market; (2) provide adequate traceability information (name, address, product identifier on or with the product); (3) maintain internal safety documentation proportionate to risks; (4) cooperate with market surveillance authorities; (5) apply corrective actions and product recalls where unsafe products are found. Non-EU manufacturers selling to EU consumers must designate an EU Responsible Person (see furneu-market-access fragment). The GPSR applies to furniture as a general consumer product where no sector-specific EU harmonised legislation fully covers all safety aspects.
summary.zh: 欧盟通用产品安全法规(EU) 2023/988（GPSR）自2024年12月13日起取代2001/95/EC指令（GPSD）。所有投放欧盟市场的消费品（包括家具）须确保安全。GPSR要求经营者：(1)在投放市场前确保产品安全；(2)提供充分的可追溯性信息（在产品上或随产品附上名称、地址、产品标识符）；(3)按照风险程度保存内部安全文件；(4)配合市场监督机构；(5)发现不安全产品时采取纠正措施并实施产品召回。向欧盟消费者销售的非欧盟制造商须指定欧盟责任人（详见furneu-market-access片段）。在针对特定行业的欧盟协调立法未能全面涵盖所有安全方面的情况下，GPSR适用于作为一般消费品的家具。
summary.zht: 歐盟通用產品安全法規(EU) 2023/988（GPSR）自2024年12月13日起取代2001/95/EC指令（GPSD）。所有投放歐盟市場的消費品（包括家具）須確保安全。GPSR要求經營者：(1)在投放市場前確保產品安全；(2)提供充分的可追溯性信息（在產品上或隨產品附上名稱、地址、產品標識符）；(3)按照風險程度保存內部安全文件；(4)配合市場監督機構；(5)發現不安全產品時採取糾正措施並實施產品召回。向歐盟消費者銷售的非歐盟製造商須指定歐盟責任人（詳見furneu-market-access片段）。在針對特定行業的歐盟協調立法未能全面涵蓋所有安全方面的情況下，GPSR適用於作為一般消費品的家具。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/988 on General Product Safety (GPSR), in force from 13 December 2024

summary.en: China's primary general product safety framework for furniture is GB 28481-2012 (Safety technical requirements for furniture), a mandatory national standard covering structural strength, stability, surface coating hazards, and restricted substances. It is administered by SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation). GB 28481 applies to furniture sold on the Chinese domestic market. China does not have a general product safety regulation equivalent in scope to the EU GPSR that imposes EU Representative obligations, traceability product-level identification rules, or GPSR-style incident reporting obligations on exporters.
summary.zh: 中国针对家具的主要通用产品安全框架为强制性国家标准GB 28481-2012（家具安全技术要求），涵盖结构强度、稳定性、表面涂层危害及限制物质，由市场监管总局管理。GB 28481适用于在中国国内市场销售的家具。中国没有与欧盟GPSR范围相当的通用产品安全法规，不对出口商施加欧盟责任人义务、产品级可追溯性标识规则或GPSR式事故报告义务。
summary.zht: 中國針對家具的主要通用產品安全框架為強制性國家標準GB 28481-2012（家具安全技術要求），涵蓋結構強度、穩定性、表面塗層危害及限制物質，由市場監管總局管理。GB 28481適用於在中國國內市場銷售的家具。中國沒有與歐盟GPSR範圍相當的通用產品安全法規，不對出口商施加歐盟責任人義務、產品級可追溯性標識規則或GPSR式事故報告義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 28481-2012 — Safety technical requirements for furniture (mandatory GB, SAMR)

gap.en: The GPSR introduces several obligations new to Chinese exporters: (1) mandatory EU Responsible Person designation for non-EU manufacturers (see market-access fragment); (2) product traceability identification on each item or its packaging; (3) internal safety documentation demonstrating the product is safe; (4) Safety Gate (RAPEX successor) notification obligations for serious risks. Chinese manufacturers typically have GB 28481 compliance documentation, but EU-format safety dossiers, DoC equivalents, and traceability markings per GPSR are additional requirements. Note: furniture does NOT require CE marking — GPSR compliance is the baseline general safety obligation.
gap.zh: GPSR为中国出口商引入了若干新义务：(1)非欧盟制造商须强制指定欧盟责任人（见市场准入片段）；(2)在每件产品或其包装上标注产品可追溯性标识；(3)证明产品安全的内部安全文件；(4)严重风险的Safety Gate（RAPEX后继系统）通报义务。中国制造商通常持有GB 28481合规文件，但符合GPSR的欧盟格式安全档案、符合性声明等同文件及可追溯性标识属于额外要求。注意：家具无需CE标志——GPSR合规是基本的通用安全义务。
gap.zht: GPSR為中國出口商引入了若干新義務：(1)非歐盟製造商須強制指定歐盟責任人（見市場准入片段）；(2)在每件產品或其包裝上標註產品可追溯性標識；(3)證明產品安全的內部安全文件；(4)嚴重風險的Safety Gate（RAPEX後繼系統）通報義務。中國製造商通常持有GB 28481合規文件，但符合GPSR的歐盟格式安全檔案、符合性聲明等同文件及可追溯性標識屬於額外要求。注意：家具無需CE標誌——GPSR合規是基本的通用安全義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GPSR (EU) 2023/988 applies to all consumer furniture placed on the EU market from 13 December 2024; CE marking is NOT required for general furniture (no applicable CE Directive/Regulation)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 28481-2012 is a mandatory national standard for furniture sold in China; no equivalent GPSR-style EU Representative or traceability obligations under Chinese export law

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GPSR (EU) 2023/988 is the mandatory general product safety framework for furniture in the EU from 13 December 2024. Furniture does NOT require CE marking — there is no applicable CE Directive or Regulation mandating CE for general domestic furniture. GPSR requires product safety documentation, traceability identification, and an EU Responsible Person for non-EU manufacturers. Chinese GB 28481 compliance documentation does not satisfy GPSR requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】GPSR (EU) 2023/988自2024年12月13日起是欧盟家具的强制性通用产品安全框架。家具无需CE标志——没有适用的CE指令或法规要求一般家居家具加贴CE标志。GPSR要求提供产品安全文件、可追溯性标识，并要求非欧盟制造商指定欧盟责任人。中国GB 28481合规文件不满足GPSR要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】GPSR (EU) 2023/988自2024年12月13日起是歐盟家具的強制性通用產品安全框架。家具無需CE標誌——沒有適用的CE指令或法規要求一般家居家具加貼CE標誌。GPSR要求提供產品安全文件、可追溯性標識，並要求非歐盟製造商指定歐盟責任人。中國GB 28481合規文件不滿足GPSR要求。

requirement_topic.en: Structural Strength and Durability — EN 12520 / EN 12521 / EN 1730
requirement_topic.zh: 结构强度与耐久性——EN 12520 / EN 12521 / EN 1730
requirement_topic.zht: 結構強度與耐久性——EN 12520 / EN 12521 / EN 1730

summary.en: While furniture does not require CE marking, EU market expectations and GPSR safety documentation commonly rely on European standards to demonstrate structural safety. EN 12520 (Furniture — Strength, durability and safety — Requirements for domestic seating) and EN 12521 (Furniture — Strength, durability and safety — Requirements for domestic tables) define performance requirements for residential seating and tables respectively. EN 1730 (Furniture — Tables — Test methods for the determination of stability, strength and durability) provides the test methods. These standards are voluntary tools for showing product safety under GPSR; alternative technical evidence may be used if it demonstrates the product is safe. Major EU retailers often require EN test reports as a contractual supply-chain condition.
summary.zh: 虽然家具无需CE标志，但欧盟市场预期及GPSR安全文件通常会依赖欧洲标准来证明结构安全性。EN 12520（家具——强度、耐久性和安全性——家用座椅要求）和EN 12521（家具——强度、耐久性和安全性——家用桌几要求）分别规定住宅用座椅和桌几的性能要求。EN 1730（家具——桌几——稳定性、强度和耐久性测定试验方法）提供检测方法。这些标准是GPSR下证明产品安全的自愿性技术工具；如其他技术证据能够证明产品安全，也可采用。主要欧盟零售商常以合同供应链条件要求EN检测报告。
summary.zht: 雖然家具無需CE標誌，但歐盟市場預期及GPSR安全文件通常會依賴歐洲標準來證明結構安全性。EN 12520（家具——強度、耐久性和安全性——家用座椅要求）和EN 12521（家具——強度、耐久性和安全性——家用桌几要求）分別規定住宅用座椅和桌几的性能要求。EN 1730（家具——桌几——穩定性、強度和耐久性測定試驗方法）提供檢測方法。這些標準是GPSR下證明產品安全的自願性技術工具；如其他技術證據能夠證明產品安全，也可採用。主要歐盟零售商常以合同供應鏈條件要求EN檢測報告。

standards_or_laws: EN 12520:2015+A1:2021 — Furniture — Strength, durability and safety — Requirements for domestic seating
EN 12521:2015+A1:2021 — Furniture — Strength, durability and safety — Requirements for domestic tables
EN 1730:2000+A1:2009 — Furniture — Tables — Test methods for the determination of stability, strength and durability

summary.en: China's GB/T 3324-2017 (General technical requirements for wooden furniture) is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard covering structural performance, materials, and dimensional tolerances for wooden furniture. GB/T 3325-2017 covers metal furniture general technical requirements. GB/T 3326-2017 covers chairs and sofas. These GB/T standards are voluntary for domestic market sales but are referenced in supply contracts. They differ from EN 12520/12521 in test loading parameters, fatigue cycle counts, and joinery requirements. Chinese GB/T test reports are generally not accepted by EU retailers as equivalent to EN 12520/12521 compliance.
summary.zh: 中国推荐性国家标准GB/T 3324-2017（木家具通用技术条件）涵盖木家具的结构性能、材料和尺寸公差，为推荐性（非强制）标准。GB/T 3325-2017涵盖金属家具通用技术条件，GB/T 3326-2017涵盖椅凳类及床类家具。上述GB/T标准在国内市场销售中属于自愿性标准，但会在供货合同中被引用。其在加载参数、疲劳循环次数及接合要求方面与EN 12520/12521存在差异。中国GB/T检测报告通常不被欧盟零售商接受为EN 12520/12521合规的等同文件。
summary.zht: 中國推薦性國家標準GB/T 3324-2017（木家具通用技術條件）涵蓋木家具的結構性能、材料和尺寸公差，為推薦性（非強制）標準。GB/T 3325-2017涵蓋金屬家具通用技術條件，GB/T 3326-2017涵蓋椅凳類及床類家具。上述GB/T標準在國內市場銷售中屬於自願性標準，但會在供貨合同中被引用。其在加載參數、疲勞循環次數及接合要求方面與EN 12520/12521存在差異。中國GB/T檢測報告通常不被歐盟零售商接受為EN 12520/12521合規的等同文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3324-2017 — General technical requirements for wooden furniture (recommended GB/T, SAMR)
GB/T 3326-2017 — General technical requirements for chairs, stools and sofa (recommended GB/T, SAMR)

gap.en: EN 12520 and EN 12521 are voluntary European standards, not mandatory legal obligations. The legal obligation is to place only safe products on the EU market under GPSR. Major retailers and B2B buyers often require EN 12520/12521 test reports contractually, so exporters should plan accredited laboratory testing where those buyers or risk assessments call for it. Chinese GB/T test reports are not direct substitutes because EN 12520 uses standardised static, dynamic, and fatigue load sequences that differ from Chinese GB/T protocols. Alternative technical evidence may be acceptable if it demonstrates equivalent structural safety for the product and destination market.
gap.zh: EN 12520和EN 12521是自愿性欧洲标准，并非强制性法律义务。法律义务是在GPSR下仅将安全产品投放欧盟市场。主要零售商和B2B采购商常以合同方式要求EN 12520/12521检测报告，因此出口商应在买方或风险评估需要时安排认可实验室检测。中国GB/T检测报告不能直接替代，因为EN 12520采用与中国GB/T规程不同的标准化静态、动态和疲劳载荷序列。如其他技术证据能够证明特定产品及目的地市场的等效结构安全性，也可能被接受。
gap.zht: EN 12520和EN 12521是自願性歐洲標準，並非強制性法律義務。法律義務是在GPSR下僅將安全產品投放歐盟市場。主要零售商和B2B採購商常以合同方式要求EN 12520/12521檢測報告，因此出口商應在買方或風險評估需要時安排認可實驗室檢測。中國GB/T檢測報告不能直接替代，因為EN 12520採用與中國GB/T規程不同的標準化靜態、動態和疲勞載荷序列。如其他技術證據能夠證明特定產品及目的地市場的等效結構安全性，也可能被接受。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary standards — EN 12520 and EN 12521 are not legally mandated; GPSR (EU) 2023/988 is the mandatory legal obligation, and these standards are voluntary technical evidence often required contractually by EU retailers; no CE marking for general furniture
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 3324, GB/T 3326 are recommended standards for domestic market; GB 28481-2012 is mandatory for safety-critical requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EN 12520 (seating) and EN 12521 (tables) are voluntary European standards that can support structural safety demonstration under GPSR. They are not legally mandatory; GPSR is the mandatory legal framework. Furniture does NOT require CE marking. Chinese GB/T test reports are not direct substitutes because test methods differ, but alternative technical evidence may be used if it demonstrates equivalent safety.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】EN 12520（座椅）和EN 12521（桌几）是自愿性欧洲标准，可支持GPSR下结构安全性证明。它们并非法律强制要求；GPSR才是强制性法律框架。家具无需CE标志。由于检测方法不同，中国GB/T检测报告不能直接替代，但如其他技术证据能够证明等效安全性，也可采用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】EN 12520（座椅）和EN 12521（桌几）是自願性歐洲標準，可支持GPSR下結構安全性證明。它們並非法律強制要求；GPSR才是強制性法律框架。家具無需CE標誌。由於檢測方法不同，中國GB/T檢測報告不能直接替代，但如其他技術證據能夠證明等效安全性，也可採用。
